## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('catalog.json', encoding='utf-8'))"` passes (valid JSON)
- [ ] `python3 neoz.py --help` still runs
- [ ] New tools include `title`, `description`, `install`, and `url`
- [ ] Content is for **authorized security testing / education** only
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
